title: Communauté de communes de Marie-Galante
summary: Communauté de communes de Marie-Galante is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure in the Guadeloupe overseas department and region of France. Created in 1994, its seat is in Grand-Bourg. Its area is 158.0 km2. Its population was 10,565 in 2019.
text:
Communauté de communes de Marie-Galante is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure in the Guadeloupe overseas department and region of France. Created in 1994, its seat is in Grand-Bourg. Its area is 158.0 km2. Its population was 10,565 in 2019.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 3 communes:

Grand-Bourg
Capesterre-de-Marie-Galante
Saint-Louis
